calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Continued To Aug-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO AVILA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Specially Appearing Defendant Alejandro Avila's unopposed motion to quash service of summons, stay or dismiss action is GRANTED. The record demonstrates Plaintiff Crown Asset Management, LLC has not effectuated substitute service on the Specially Appearing Defendant and, thus, the court is currently without jurisdiction over him for purposes of this action. (See CCP section 418.10(a)(1).) The proof of service filed on December 26, 2025, is quashed and of no effect.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and place a hard copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
